## Problem

What limitation are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the proposed feature.

## Why It Fits This Project

Explain how it helps the knowledge workflow, template quality, or open-source usability.

## Alternatives Considered

List simpler or alternative approaches.

## Additional Context

Add examples or references if useful.
